creator: svysh@pn.sinp.msu.ru
text:
I agree, except of one point:

Dependency lang/p5-Error is explicitly required by this port, and
it is not part of perl, and it is not (directly or indirectly)
required by other dependencies of this port. Thus I suggest
to keep the following line in the Makefile:

         ${SITE_PERL}/Error.pm:${PORTSDIR}/lang/p5-Error \

immediately after the line

BUILD_DEPENDS=  \


Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-RT-Client-REST,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/121026 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/121026
>
